description: Style NoteIn earthy tones, coolers comes up with this sharp pair of sandals for a great look this spring. Sandals needn't necessarily tone down your casual ensemble - this pair is the right choice to perfectly offset your summer look. Style this with fitted trousers or cargo shorts for maximum impact.Product DetailsBlack round toed sandals with forefoot and midfoot strapsHas a buckled ankle loopSoft, padded leather footbed with brand printUpper adhered to the textured rubber outsole, upraised at the heel with grooves all overMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with soft cloth to maintain shine and keep away dust and dirt
